match.userMessage:

  "sceneId": "scene10",
  "sceneNumber": 10,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - WIDE EXIT\n\nFinal wide locked shot. Scarlett walks away along the shore, figure small against ocean and sky. Airy, high-key fade with true-to-life color.",
    "dialogue": []
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Final Wide Exit",
    "durationSeconds": 7,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH",
    "timeOfDay": "dusk",
    "storyBeat": "Closing wide shot and fade"
  },
  "prompts": {
    "visual": {
      "fullPrompt": "Wide locked cinematic frame of SCARLETT wearing light casual beachwear suitable for water and promenade walking away along the shoreline at Bondi Beach during dusk, her figure small against the expansive ocean and open sky, sandy shore stretching into the distance with gentle receding waves, natural coastal environment with faint promenade visible in the background, airy high-key lighting with true-to-life color grading, soft warm dusk glow blending into cooler sky tones, crisp whites and natural skin-warm highlights, shallow depth of field emphasizing the lone figure against vast water and horizon, wide angle lens establishing shot with clean directional shadows and an effortlessly cool editorial energy.",
      "negativePrompt": "close-up, text, logos, multiple people, holographic elements, heavy diffusion, artificial lighting, overexposed highlights, grainy film look",
      "components": {
        "sceneDescription": "Final wide locked exit shot with Scarlett walking away along the shore, figure small against ocean and sky",
        "subject": "SCARLETT in light casual beachwear suitable for water and promenade, walking away from camera",
        "environment": "Bondi Beach shoreline at dusk with sandy shore, gentle waves, open ocean, and distant sky",
        "lighting": "Airy high-key dusk glow with true-to-life color, soft warm highlights fading into cooler tones, natural directional shadows",
        "camera": "Wide locked establishing shot, wide angle lens, 16:9 aspect ratio, eye-level framing",
        "composition": "Lone small figure centered against vast horizon, negative space emphasizing scale of ocean and sky",
        "style": "Modern social-first editorial photography with tactile real-life context and clean bright aesthetic",
        "technical": "High resolution, crisp focus on distant figure, shallow depth of field on horizon, true-to-life color grading",
        "atmosphere": "Fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool closing moment with bright breezy energy"
      }
    }
  },
  "continuity": {
    "characterTags": [
      "scarlett"
    ],
    "environmentTag": "bondi_beach_dusk",
    "elementTags": [],
    "colorPalette": "warm golds ocean blues sand tones with dusk fading light",
    "lightingSetup": "airy high-key natural dusk glow",

  }
}
</CURRENT_SCENE>

  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - FINAL SHORELINE\n\nMacro detail: lipstick tube half-buried in sand, waves receding. Direct flash punch on the coral cap.\n\nSUPER: CORAL. OUT NOW.",

  "prompts": {

      "fullPrompt": "Macro product photography of a lipstick tube half-buried in damp sand on the shoreline at Bondi Beach during dusk, receding waves leaving smooth trails across the foreground sand with the ocean horizon softly visible in the background, captured using direct on-camera flash that delivers a sharp punch of light across the coral cap, shallow depth of field isolating the textures of wet sand and glossy product surface against a gently blurred coastal setting, bright natural golden-hour glow mixed with the flash for immediate tactile energy, eye-level tight framing focused on the product resting in the sand, modern social-first editorial style with crisp true-to-life color and clean contrast",

[

]

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
(Strictly apply camera movement and pacing preferences)
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>
